note: Advisory sandbox re-linter layered on the ground packet linter (scripts/p0pgr_packet_lint_v1.py). Emits CHECK_OK/CHECK_REJECTED, never PASS. Read-only over receipts/p0pgr/repair_candidates and receipts/p0pgr/outbox; mutates no packet, candidate, or receipt.
title: Repair-Candidate Re-Linter (re-runs the ground linter against a candidate's referenced packet and diffs reasons before/after)

subject.note: re-imports and re-runs the SAME lint_packet the runtime files repair candidates with; no reimplementation, no relaxation

finding.detail: All 5 on-disk repair candidates reference packets that no longer exist (their recorded packet_path points at ephemeral pytest temp dirs, and no receipts/p0pgr/outbox/P0PGR-20260708-001.json exists to fall back to). Status=UNRESOLVED_PACKET: the filed repairs cannot be re-verified against a live packet. The 10 outbox corpus packets all re-lint CHECK_OK.
finding.interpretation: Repair candidates are being filed against transient packet paths, so no downstream re-linter (this one included) can confirm whether the flagged reasons were ever actually repaired. Reported as a finding, not hidden.

what_it_proves: a REAL outbox packet (P0PGR-20260708-002) re-lints CHECK_OK with zero reasons (positive; no relaxation)

a MINIMAL MUTATION of that same real packet (one hard_block_allowed_reasons value -> bogus enum) is flagged -> CHECK_REJECTED citing the exact reason (positive control: a zero-hit elsewhere cannot be a broken-regex false-clean)
a second independent minimal mutation (drop required execution_mode) is also flagged -> CHECK_REJECTED (detector is not tied to one reason)

repair-candidate diff: a candidate whose packet re-lints clean -> reasons RESOLVED, CHECK_OK (repair confirmed); a candidate whose packet still carries its filed reason -> still_present, CHECK_REJECTED (repair NOT confirmed)
a candidate whose referenced packet is missing -> UNRESOLVED_PACKET, CHECK_REJECTED (cannot re-verify; surfaced, not swallowed)
a full run leaves every outbox packet AND repair candidate byte-identical (sha unchanged); tool is strictly read-only
verdict vocab CHECK_OK/CHECK_REJECTED, never a bare governance PASS; exits NONZERO on any CHECK_REJECTED (not always-exit-0)
chess_patches_applied: re-runs the REAL ground linter via importlib against real on-disk packets (no strawman reimplementation of lint rules)
negative fixture is a MINIMAL MUTATION of a real outbox packet (flip one value / drop one field) done on a temp copy, not a hand-built fake
positive control (the mutated-packet detector) is asserted green so a clean packet's zero-hit is trustworthy
origin=sandbox-advisory / authority=none; reports lint violations and unresolved repairs as findings, never its own PASS
locks_respected: Lock 1/2/5/6/7 append-only: no tracked file edited/overwritten/removed; every packet + candidate sha unchanged after a full run
read-only re-linter (mutations only ever on temp copies; ground linter imported, not modified)
no live call: no network, no Supabase, no send/dispatch, no deploy
DRAFT-only posture preserved: tool never writes packets, never sets AUTO_DISPATCH_APPROVED, never touches the queue
wrote only inside catalog/builds/MO-4/; no git write commands; other lanes' untracked drops left alone

results.real_repo_run: CHECK_REJECTED exit 1 (5 candidates UNRESOLVED_PACKET, 10 outbox packets CHECK_OK)
results.red_canary: FIRED (asserting CHECK_OK on a minimally-mutated real packet fails)

exit_gate_B3: MO-4 done (re-linter re-runs the ground linter against a repair candidate's referenced packet and diffs reasons; red-capable via minimal mutation of a real outbox packet + positive control; surfaces 5 unresolvable repair candidates as a real finding).
next_action: File repair candidates with a durable packet reference (persist the packet or point at receipts/p0pgr/outbox/<packet_id>.json) so filed repairs can be re-verified; then re-run MO-4 to confirm each flagged reason was actually resolved.
